name: monata-sim-env
description: Set up complete local Monata simulation environments with pixi, circuit tools, techlibs, and a runnable demo.

interface.longDescription: Inspect a Monata workspace, build or reuse required local circuit-tool packages, create a project-local pixi environment, install Monata, bootstrap PTM_MG and PTM_BULK techlibs under MONATA_HOME, generate the Monata README demo, and run the demo successfully.
defaultPrompt: Set up the complete Monata simulation environment in this directory, including techlibs and the README demo.
